This project provides Python practice for core linear algebra concepts: vectors and plotting vector addition and scalar multiplication linear combinations, span, and basis vectors generated visualizations and study notes Documentation ¶ Getting Started Notes and summaries Contributing Repository resources ¶ Chapter 1 notes Chapter 2 notes Chapter 1 script Chapter 2 script

This project provides Python practice for core linear algebra concepts: vectors and plotting vector addition and scalar multiplication linear combinations, span, and basis vectors generated visualizations and study notes

docs.text: Contributing ¶ Contributions are welcome to improve the linear algebra learning experience. See the repository root CONTRIBUTING.md for full contribution guidelines. Filing issues ¶ Use the bug report or feature request template in .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ . Provide a clear description, reproduction steps, and environment details. Pull requests ¶ Fork the repository and create a small, focused branch. Test your changes locally. Submit a pull request with a clear summary of what changed.

docs.text: Getting Started ¶ Requirements ¶ Python 3.11+ recommended numpy matplotlib mkdocs Install dependencies ¶ python -m venv .venv source .venv/bin/activate python -m pip install --upgrade pip pip install -r requirements.txt Run the example scripts ¶ python code/chapter1/chapter1_vectors.py python code/chapter2/linear_combinations_ch2.py Build the documentation site ¶ mkdocs build Preview locally ¶ mkdocs serve
docs.title: Getting Started

docs.text: python -m venv .venv source .venv/bin/activate python -m pip install --upgrade pip pip install -r requirements.txt
docs.title: Install dependencies

docs.text: Notes ¶ This repository includes learning notes and examples for each chapter of the linear algebra project.
